title: Underpunks: The Create Age
description: A Vanilla+ and Create focused modpack. Designed for and used on the official Underpunks Minecraft Server.
body:
Underpunks: The Create Age is a Vanilla+ and Create focused 1.20.1 kitchensink modpack, built for the official Underpunks Minecraft Server - a whitelisted server for the Underpunks Discord Game community.

## Features

This pack uses Create, Supplementaries, Farmers Delight, and Simple Storage Network to create an almost vanilla experience, but allowing for automation, better storage solutions, and more building blocks to choose from.

## Performance and Requirements

4GB of RAM should be more than enough to run this modpack.
Distant Horizons is installed and that may affect your performance depending on your system requirements. Play with the mod's LOD Distance Render Distance or disable entirely.

## Who is this for?

If you are new to modded minecraft or an experienced player looking to slow down and enjoy the finer things in life, this would be an excellent modpack for you. Otherwise, if you are looking for a complex and highly customized modpack, you may want to look elsewhere.

## Looking to move your Vanilla world to Modded?

This pack was built to be installed on top of an existing vanilla server. Therefore, mods added had limited world generation additions. Create and Farmer's Delight are the only significant mods that add new items/blocks to world generation, if you're playing on a previously-vanilla world you'll need to travel to new chunks to access these blocks.

## Underpunks Server

As mentioned above, this modpack was designed for players of the Underpunks Discord Game Server. Access to the official minecraft server is only open to verified and trusted members of the Underpunks Discord Game community. More details about the game can be found [here](https://underpunks.com/).
